rationale: The citation is used directly in the empirical analysis, not as general background. The authors explicitly report spotlight tests and Johnson-Neyman floodlight analyses and attribute this probing approach to Spiller et al. (2013). They also cite Spiller et al. for a specific within-subject contrast-score analysis, indicating concrete methodological use in testing their hypotheses.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013) as a methodological template for interpreting moderated effects, especially via spotlight and floodlight simple-effects probing. It uses these procedures repeatedly across studies to identify where interaction effects are significant.
